data.title: SEC Considers Classification of XRP Alongside Ethereum
data.description: According to Odaily, market sources indicate that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is deliberating on whether XRP should be classified as a commodity. The discussion also involves whether XRP should be categorized similarly to Ethereum (ETH).

data.title: U.S. Department of Government Efficiency recommends cutting nearly 20% of IRS staff
data.description: According to CNN, Musk's Department of Government Efficiency has proposed a significant reduction in the size of the Internal Revenue Service (IRS), cutting nearly 20% of its employees by May 15 (a month after US Tax Day). President Trump ordered federal government agencies to submit "massive" layoff plans by Thursday local time. According to a person familiar with the matter, the details of the IRS proposal have been published in an email from the Department of Government Efficiency and will be discussed at a meeting of agency leadership on Thursday morning. The latest round of layoffs will lay off nearly 6,800 employees, in addition to about 6,700 probationary employees who have already been fired and 4,700 employees who have accepted the Trump administration's voluntary buyout program. (Jinshi)

data.title: CME to Launch Solana Futures, Indicating Market Maturity
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Titan founder Chris Chung has announced that the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) is set to introduce Solana futures on March 17. This development signifies the growing maturity of the Solana asset market, potentially facilitating regulatory approval for similar financial products. Chung anticipates that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) might approve the spot ETF applications for Solana submitted by VanEck and Canary Capital as early as May.

data.title: ARK Invest adds $80 million to its Bitcoin holdings
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, ARK Invest received $80 million worth of Bitcoin from Coinbase today.

data.title: Saylor, who predicted $13M Bitcoin, says it will be the largest asset in four years
data.description:
MicroStrategy's executive chairman, Michael Saylor, said U.S. corporations could end up sitting on $20 trillion to $40 trillion in Bitcoin by the decade's end.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/saylor-says-bitcoin-will-be-the-largest-asset-in-four-years

data.title: Solana CME futures tip impending US ETF approvals — Exec
data.description:
The upcoming launch of Solana (SOL) futures on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME), a US derivatives exchange, signals that the first US SOL exchange-traded fund (ETF) listings are coming soon, Chris Chung, founder of Solana-based swap platform Titan, told Cointelegraph. On March 17, CME is preparing to launch SOL futures contracts. They will be among the first regulated Solana futures to...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sol-cme-futures-tip-impending-us-etf-approval-exec?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Aave proposes Horizon to enhance institutional adoption of DeFi
data.description:
Leading DeFi protocol Aave has announced plans to launch Horizon, a new initiative focused on building institutional DeFi products. The protocol founder, Stani Kulechov, announced this on X, noting that this initiative will take decentralized finance to the next level. According to him, solutions that integrate real-world assets (RWA) into DeFi are needed to bring […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/aave-proposes-horizon-to-enhance-institutional-adoption-of-defi/

data.title: Bitcoin outlook strengthens as USDT market cap expands and indicators enter oversold zone
data.description:
The outlook for Bitcoin (BTC) is showing signs of improvement as stablecoin liquidity increases and key market indicators signal a potential reversal of the recent deep correction. CryptoQuant highlighted a significant expansion in the market capitalization of Tether USD (USDT), which usually leads to rising Bitcoin prices. USDT’s market capitalization has grown by $5.75 billion […]
The post...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-outlook-strengthens-as-usdt-market-cap-expands-and-indicators-enter-oversold-zone/

data.title: Trump Admin Wants to Acquire as Much Bitcoin as Possible: White House
data.description:
A White House official told a room of crypto industry leaders this week that there should be no limit to the size of a U.S. government Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
source: https://decrypt.co/309948/trump-admin-acquire-much-bitcoin-possible-white-house

data.title: DOGE proposes slashing Internal Revenue Service staff by 20%
data.description:
The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is reportedly proposing cutting the Internal Revenue Service’s (IRS) workforce by 20% in a change expected to take effect by May 15, 2025.According to CNN, the cuts would impact an estimated 6,800 employees at the government agency, in addition to the 6,700 probationary employees who have already been let go and 4,700 IRS agents who were given...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/doge-slashing-internal-revenue-service-staff-20?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
